final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with read and write functionality. It has inputs data_in (16 bits), addr (4 bits), we (write enable, 1 bit), and clk (clock signal). The output data_out (16 bits) provides the stored data during a read operation.
module dram_cell (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire [3:0] addr,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16 x 16-bit memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end else begin
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
